ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from selecting a reports to contact which is not part of the same company / GAM
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISNEW(), OR( AND( ISBLANK(Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c) , AccountId <> ReportsTo.AccountId ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c)), Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c <> ReportsTo.Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c ) ), NOT(ISBLANK(ReportsToId)) , $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false ), AND( NOT(ISNEW()), OR( AND( ISBLANK(Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c) , AccountId <> ReportsTo.AccountId ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c)), Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c <> ReportsTo.Account.Ultimate_Parent_ID__c ) ), NOT(ISBLANK(ReportsToId)) , ISCHANGED(ReportsToId), $User.BypassValidationRules__c = false ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot choose a contact who is not part of the same company or of the same GAM
